disclosure.label: Important notice
disclosure.full: ReserveChain is currently in development. No tokens are being offered or sold through this website. Registration of interest does not constitute an investment, token purchase, asset reservation, price reservation, allocation of tokens or entitlement to participate in any future offering. Any future availability will be subject to the final legal and corporate structure, definitive offering documentation, asset verification, jurisdictional eligibility, KYC/KYB, sanctions screening and approval.
disclosure.provisional: Preliminary illustrative information only — subject to documentary verification, independent assessment and final approval. No asset or token is currently offered for sale through this website.

home.kicker: Swiss Industrial Metals · RWA Tokenization · In Development
home.title: Building the Infrastructure for Tokenized Industrial Metals
home.subtitle: ReserveChain is developing an institutional platform intended to connect documented industrial-metal assets with digital tokenization, verification, custody and physical-redemption infrastructure. The corporate, legal, custody, asset-verification and technical arrangements are currently being finalized.
home.note: Swiss corporate and issuance structure in development.

hiw.title: How ReserveChain Proposes to Work
hiw.subtitle: Subject to final legal, custody, asset-verification and technical confirmation.

register.title: 1. Document & Register
register.body: Industrial-metal lots are documented in the registry with certificates, custody and valuation records.

verify.title: 2. Verify & Attest
verify.body: Independent verification, custody confirmation and reserve reconciliation are prepared before any activation.

tokenize.title: 3. Tokenize (Planned)
tokenize.body: A configurable ERC-20 infrastructure is built and tested on testnet; mainnet only after written authorization.

passport.docsNote: No documents available — pending verification and upload.

waitlist.title: Join the Project Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Registration of interest only. No investment, allocation or reservation is implied.
waitlist.eligibilityNotice: Eligibility Notice: Registration of interest does not constitute an investment, token purchase, asset reservation, price reservation, allocation of tokens or entitlement to participate in any future offering. No wallet connection or payment is required or permitted at this stage.

c.notInvestment: I understand that registration does not constitute an investment or reservation.
c.notRestricted: I am not located in a restricted jurisdiction.
c.privacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy.

waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

done.title: You're on the waitlist
done.body: Thank you for registering your interest. We will contact you with project updates. No investment or reservation has been made.

footer.tagline: Institutional infrastructure for tokenized industrial metals (in development).
footer.rights: © 2026 ReserveChain. Swiss corporate structure in development.
